name: LLM Internals
description: Transformer architecture, attention mechanisms, tokenization, KV cache, context windows, quantization, speculative decoding, and mixture of experts.

name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
description: RAG pipelines, embedding models, vector databases, chunking strategies, hybrid search, reranking, and RAG evaluation frameworks.

name: Fine-tuning & Alignment
description: Supervised fine-tuning, PEFT, LoRA/QLoRA, instruction tuning, RLHF, DPO, dataset curation, and catastrophic forgetting.

name: Prompt Engineering
description: Zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, tree-of-thought, self-consistency, structured output, and adversarial prompting.

name: Agentic Systems & Tool Use
description: Function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP), ReAct, Plan-and-Execute, multi-agent orchestration, and agent memory architectures.

name: MLOps for LLMs
description: Model serving (vLLM, TGI, Triton), throughput vs. latency trade-offs, cost optimization, and LLM observability.

name: AI Safety & Ethics
description: Hallucination mitigation, red-teaming, bias auditing, responsible AI frameworks, EU AI Act, and output guardrails.

name: Behavioral & Situational
description: STAR method, technical trade-off reasoning, communicating AI limitations, cross-functional collaboration, and production incident debugging.
